mapper.sql: r.id, r.tenant_id, t.tenant_name, r.role_name, r.role_key, r.role_type, r.data_scope, r.sort, r.role_status, r.is_system, r.remark, r.create_dept, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.del_flag
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_tenant t ON t.id = r.tenant_id AND t.del_flag = 0
ORDER BY r.sort ASC, r.create_time DESC
SELECT FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_tenant t ON t.id = r.tenant_id AND t.del_flag = 0 WHERE r.id = #{id} AND r.del_flag = 0

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_tenant sut ON sut.user_id = u.id AND sut.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND sut.status = 1 WHERE u.id IN
#{userId}
AND
CASE WHEN u.user_type = 0 THEN 0 WHEN sut.member_type = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END != 0
CASE WHEN u.user_type = 0 THEN 0 WHEN sut.member_type = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END = 2
1 = 0

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user_role ur LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_tenant sut ON sut.user_id = ur.user_id AND sut.tenant_id = ur.tenant_id AND sut.status = 1 WHERE ur.role_id = #{roleId} AND ur.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND ( u.id IS NULL OR (u.user_type != 0 AND sut.user_id IS NULL) OR
CASE WHEN u.user_type = 0 THEN 0 WHEN sut.member_type = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END != 0
CASE WHEN u.user_type = 0 THEN 0 WHEN sut.member_type = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END = 2
1 = 0
)
